// Generated by bpmn-to-code
package de.emaarco.example.types;

import java.lang.String;

public class BpmnFlow {
  public final String id;

  public final String name;

  public final String sourceRef;

  public final String targetRef;

  public final String condition;

  public final boolean isDefault;

  public BpmnFlow(String id, String name, String sourceRef, String targetRef, String condition,
      boolean isDefault) {
    this.id = id;
    this.name = name;
    this.sourceRef = sourceRef;
    this.targetRef = targetRef;
    this.condition = condition;
    this.isDefault = isDefault;
  }
}
